news.t: European defense stocks are cooling off after the military spending boom. Here's what's next
Defense-tech stocks are the hot trade as Iran conflict widens

holdings.infoBox: WDEF is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are Thales stock at 10.54%, BAE Systems at 10.08%, Rheinmetall AG at 9.93%, Leonardo S.p.a. at 5.47%, and Saab AB at 5.28%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Europe Defense Fund (WDEF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree Europe Defence index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of European companies engaged in the defense industry. Index constituents have at least 10% revenue in defense-related activities and are weighted based on exposure. WDEF was launched on Jul 17, 2025 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: European defense stocks are cooling off after the military spending boom. Here's what's next
data.text: Defense stocks in Europe have struggled in 2026 against the broader index. Analysts see 2026 as a period of consolidation in which investors have become more selective on winners.

data.title: Defense-tech stocks are the hot trade as Iran conflict widens
data.text: In a week when conflict in Iran sent the U.S. equity market into a tailspin, technology stocks tied to cybersecurity and artificial intelligence have proved more resilient than sectors investors have ...
